regions.text: Stepping on a scale causes physical changes: springs pull and a pointer moves.
(Diagram: Feet on a scale). When you see the weight, light rays enter your eye and hit the retina.
(Diagram: Anatomy of an eye with light rays focusing on the retina). The lens in your eye is made of living cells.
lens: clear part of the eye or camera. retina: sensitive cells at the back of the eye.
